name: sutra
description: Sutra — Operating system for building with AI. Input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace. Opinionated governance for Claude Code sessions.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Sutra Core — governance primitives: input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace + v2.6.2 D36 Feedback Channel three-layer defense (routing rule v2 + new feedback-channel-guard PreToolUse:Bash hook blocking gh issue/pr create/comment/review on sankalpasawa/sutra* + binary --label fix) + v2.6.2 D37 Sutra Assistant Layer default-OFF (opt-in via ~/.sutra-assistant-enabled or SUTRA_ASSISTANT_ENABLED; hard kill-switches still win) + v2.6.1 Trust Mode `gh` refinement + v2.6 PROTO-024 V1 client→team feedback fanout + Tier 1.6 Trust Mode permissions + strengthened scrub. Hooks warn when depth marker is missing before Edit/Write; estimation metrics on session end; reset-turn-markers fires on Stop event (spoof-safe). Includes session-retrieve for recovering abruptly-closed sessions. Privacy: see ~/.sutra/PRIVACY.md; opt out with SUTRA_TELEMETRY=0; feedback fanout opt-out via SUTRA_FEEDBACK_FANOUT=0 or ~/.sutra-feedback-fanout-disabled.
